name: Roxxie
description:
A kangaroo bandit! You’re the sheriff of gold springs and are going after this notorious thief, the real question isn’t if you’ll even get her, but more, if you can survive…
*Character was made from a character used in the games Texas in trouble by squashedflat!* *I recommend the game if your into fart stuff and being squashed!*
